overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a wealthy residential estate garden with manicured hedges and cypress trees, transitioning to city streets, a parking lot, and sidewalks in the Rockford Hills area of Los Santos. The clip features clear summer weather with bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: estate garden with manicured hedges and cypress trees

events.description: entering estate garden through iron gate
turning right along curved garden pathway

agents.ego_description: walking through the estate garden along stone pathways, passing manicured hedges and tall cypress trees

entered.detail: black wrought iron estate gate with stone pillars
large stone gate pillars flanking the entrance
neatly trimmed green hedges lining the pathway
tall narrow evergreen trees in the garden
large residential building visible through the garden

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a wealthy estate entrance, moving through an iron gate into a manicured garden. Tall cypress trees and neatly trimmed hedges line the stone pathway as the camera curves right through the landscaped grounds.

events.description: exiting garden onto city street sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a quiet residential street with parked cars visible

entered.detail: asphalt road with street lamps and parked vehicles
paved pedestrian walkway along the street
blue recycling bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the garden estate, the scene transitions to a sunny residential street. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk past blue trash bins and street lamps, with the estate building now visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor parking lot with parked vehicles

events.description: turning left to exit parking lot back to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot past parked cars including a white sports car and black sedan

entered.detail: open asphalt parking area with white directional arrows
low concrete wall separating parking lot from sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an open parking lot from the sidewalk, walking past parked vehicles including a white sports car. After exploring the lot, it turns left to exit back toward the street, with hills and distant buildings visible in the background.

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting briefly at the stop sign, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign on the corner
large historic brick building with arched windows

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street intersection, the camera stops at a red stop sign before crossing the road. A black sedan drives through the intersection, and a large brick building dominates the right side of the frame. Pedestrians are visible walking on the opposite sidewalk.

events.description: turning onto sidewalk next to brick building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a large brick building, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red brick wall of the building up close
decorative stone balustrade along building entrance
mature tree with dense canopy shading the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Turning onto the sidewalk alongside the brick building, the camera walks in the shade of large mature trees. The building's red brick wall and stone railing are prominent on the left, while pedestrians walk toward the camera on the narrow pathway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins within the secluded luxury of a private estate and gradually opens into the bustling urban environment of a sunny city neighborhood. It begins by passing through an iron gate into a manicured garden, curving along a stone pathway lined with tall cypress trees and trimmed hedges. As the camera exits the estate, the scene transitions to a bright residential street where the view expands to include concrete sidewalks, street lamps, and blue trash bins. The movement then shifts into an open parking lot past a white sports car before turning back toward a street intersection, where the camera pauses at a stop sign as a black sedan drives by. Finally, the path leads alongside a large brick building and stone railing, moving into the shade of mature trees as pedestrians approach on the narrow sidewalk.
